home.globalProxyDesc: All traffic goes through the proxy
home.smartProxyDesc: Direct connection for domestic, proxy for foreign
home.directConnectionDesc: All traffic goes directly without proxy
home.startProxyFirst: Please start the proxy service first
home.autoScrollDisabled: Auto-scrolling disabled (scroll to bottom to enable)
home.topologyError: Cannot connect to API, ensure proxy is running
home.tunNeedsAdmin: TUN mode requires admin privileges, please run the app as administrator
home.tunDriverFail: TUN driver failed to load, please check if wintun.dll exists
home.tunInterfaceFail: TUN interface creation failed, please check network settings
home.singboxMissing: sing-box core file is missing or cannot start
home.selectServerHint: Please select a server to enable proxy

proxyMode.title: Proxy Mode
proxyMode.systemProxyModeDesc: Forward traffic via HTTP/SOCKS system proxy (Legacy)
proxyMode.tunModeDesc: Transparent proxy via virtual network interface (Requires Admin)
proxyMode.tunModeNote: TUN mode automatically configures virtual adapter and DNS
proxyMode.reconnectWarning: ⚠️ Currently connected, changing proxy mode requires reconnection
proxyMode.confirmDesc: Changing proxy mode will disconnect the current connection. You will need to reconnect manually.
proxyMode.confirmSwitch: Are you sure you want to switch to
proxyMode.reconnectToast: Please reconnect to apply the new mode

servers.pageDesc: Manage your proxy servers and subscription links
servers.noServerConfiguredDesc: You haven't added any server configs yet. Click the button above to add your first server.
servers.failDeleteDesc: An error occurred while deleting the server
servers.failSelectDesc: An error occurred while selecting the server
servers.failSaveDesc: An error occurred while saving the server
servers.failSaveSubDesc: An error occurred while saving the subscription
servers.batchDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} manually added nodes? Subscription nodes will not be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
servers.noServersDesc: Try adjusting your search keywords or filters.
servers.noNodesDesc: This subscription has no nodes yet. Click the 'Update Nodes' button above to fetch the latest data.
servers.deleteServerConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the server "{{serverName}}"? This action cannot be undone.
servers.deleteSubDesc: Are you sure you want to delete subscription "{{name}}"? This will also delete all {{count}} nodes under it. This action cannot be undone.

rules.domainRulesDesc: Custom rules have the highest priority and will override global proxy mode and smart routing rules
rules.ruleGuide1: · Entering a domain will automatically match the domain and all its subdomains
rules.ruleGuide2: · e.g. google.com will match google.com, www.google.com, etc.
rules.ruleGuide3: · Each rule supports multiple domains, one per line
rules.ruleGuide4: · Rules are matched from top to bottom by priority
rules.ruleGuide5: · Custom rules have higher priority than global proxy mode and smart routing
rules.ruleGuide6: · Bypass FakeIP: Uses real DNS resolution, suitable for QUIC/UDP protocols (like Cloudflare Tunnel)

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.domesticDnsDesc: Used to resolve domestic domains. Recommended: domestic DoH or UDP DNS
advanced.foreignDnsDesc: Used to resolve foreign domains, prevents DNS poisoning (sent through proxy)
advanced.fakeIpDesc: Significantly reduces first-connection latency, but may break apps that depend on real IPs
advanced.portsSame: SOCKS and HTTP ports cannot be the same
advanced.portsSaved: Port settings saved, take effect after restarting proxy
advanced.terminalProxyDesc: Copy the following commands to set proxy in terminal (proxy must be started first)
advanced.tipSessionOnly: Terminal proxy settings are only effective in the current session
advanced.tipPermanent: For permanent settings, add the command to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc
advanced.tipSocksPort: SOCKS5 proxy port: {{port}} (supported by some tools)
advanced.tipDisable: To disable proxy: delete or comment out the relevant environment variables

about.title: About
about.builtWith: A cross-platform proxy client built on sing-box
about.coreAlreadyLatest: Core is already up to date
about.doNotClose: Do not close the app, proxy service may be temporarily interrupted

sub.addDesc: Enter subscription URL to import server nodes
sub.autoUpdateDesc: When enabled, FlowZ will attempt to update subscription nodes on startup
